product: Dashboard Git integration and workflow improvements
tagline: Improved diff review for dashboard files: When committing dashboard changes to Git, queries and text box content now appear across multiple lines in the diff, making changes easier to review.
what_it_does: Improved diff review for dashboard files: When committing dashboard changes to Git, queries and text box content now appear across multiple lines in the diff, making changes easier to review. Multi statement queries in Genie on dashboards: Genie on dashboards now supports multistatement SQL queries. Improved schedule and subscribe workflow: You can now add subscribers when setting up a new schedule.
why_it_matters: Improved diff review for dashboard files: When committing dashboard changes to Git, queries and text box content now appear across multiple lines in the diff, making changes easier to review.
plain_summary: Improved diff review for dashboard files: When committing dashboard changes to Git, queries and text box content now appear across multiple lines in the diff, making changes easier to review. Multi statement queries in Genie on dashboards: Genie on…

capabilities.title: Include pages: Select which dashboard
capabilities.desc: Include pages: Select which dashboard pages to include as PDF attachments. Pages are attached in the selected order.

capabilities.title: Include data: Select widgets to
capabilities.desc: Include data: Select widgets to include as data attachments and choose an export format (CSV, TSV, or Excel).

key_takeaway: Improved diff review for dashboard files: When committing dashboard changes to Git, queries and text box content now appear across multiple lines in the diff, making changes easier to review.
